creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 210100
upnp - 1.10.1

Update to 1.10.1.

Changelog: https://github.com/pupnp/pupnp/blob/master/ChangeLog
(A changelog is already available for version 1.12.0, but the release has not been done yet).

The port has been tested successfully with poudriere on {11.3,12.1}-RELEASE {i386,amd64}.
The following ports, dependent on upnp, have been tested successfully as well and probably need a PORTREVISION bump:
- net-p2p/amule;
- net-p2p/amule-devel;
- multimedia/vlc.
